name: Video
description: Supports YouTube, Vimeo, and direct MP4 links. An optional picture acts as a click-to-play placeholder.

fields.name: placeholder
fields.description: Optional picture used as a click-to-play placeholder.

usageNotes: The visible source contract is simple and generation-safe.
Desktop alignment is read from section dataset, not block content. Keep it optional in downstream tooling.
ambiguityNotes: The code comment says 'left / middle / right' while the actual enum uses left, center, right. Use center, because that is what the code maps.
